steps.text: Go to Kerning City (Jazz Bar, hidden entrance).
Talk to Dark Lord → 1st Job: Rogue. Requires DEX 25.
Grind to level 30. Suggested maps below.
2nd Job: talk to Dark Lord, receive the Dark Marble quest → Inner Door (portal in Swamp Region). Collect 30 Dark Marbles from the test snails/octis.
Return to Dark Lord → choose Assassin. Raise Claw Mastery and Critical Throw first.
Grind to level 70.
maps: Mysterious Path 3 (55-70; use Truckers/Wild Kargo as alternatives)

steps.text: 3rd Job: talk to Dark Lord in Kerning City → then Arec in El Nath. Door of Dimension (Ant Tunnel) → defeat Dark Lord's clone → Black Charm → Holy Stone quiz (5 questions, bring mesos for failed answers).
Turn in to Arec → Hermit. Prioritize Shadow Partner and Avenger depending on your build.
Grind to level 120.
maps: Himes / Dreamy Ghosts (90-120, HS mule ideal)

steps.text: 4th Job: talk to Hellin in Leafre (Valley of the Antelope). Collect Heroic Star (Manon) and Heroic Pentagon (Griffey) — drops are tradeable in Royals, you can buy them.
Turn in to Hellin → Night Lord. Buy Triple Throw skill books and max according to The Clinic's guide.
Levels 10–30: Kerning Construction Site (Octopus) and Subway B1 (Stirge).
Levels 30–50: Party quest when you can find a party — Kerning PQ (21–30) then Ludi PQ (35–50). Solo: Ant Tunnel / Swamp.
Levels 50–70: Mysterious Path 3 or Wild Kargo / Truckers (55–70). NL stars shine here.
Levels 70–100: Wolf Spiders in Silent Swamp. Steady solo EXP.
Levels 100–120: Himes / Dreamy Ghosts (HS mule helps). Alternative: Gallos.
Levels 120–140: Continue Himes or move to LHC / Temple of Time prep maps. Boss prequest guides in library when ready.
Levels 140–200: Showa PQ (50–70 party, still viable meso/EXP), leech at endgame maps, or grind at your comfortable map. Use OCR to confirm map name.
Levels 10–30: Kerning Construction Site (Octopus) and Subway B1 (Stirge).
Levels 30–50: Kerning PQ (21–30) and Ludi PQ (35–50) when you can party. Solo: Ant Tunnel.
Levels 50–70: Mysterious Path 3 or Wild Kargo / Truckers.
Levels 70–100: Wolf Spiders in Silent Swamp.
Levels 100–120: Himes / Dreamy Ghosts or Gallos.
Levels 120–130: Continue Himes or move toward LHC / Minar Forest.
Levels 130–150: Singapore Ulu Estate I → II → III (Veetron).
Levels 150–200: Leech at endgame maps, boss runs, or your comfortable train map.
Go to Perion → Warriors' Sanctuary.
Talk to Dances with Balrog → 1st Job: Warrior. Requires STR 35.
Grind to level 30. Suggested maps below.
maps: Construction Site (Octopus — if leeching from KC)

steps.text: 2nd Job: talk to Dances with Balrog, receive the test quest → Underground Pass (portal in Perion). Collect 30 Black Crystals from the test monsters.
Return to Dances with Balrog → choose Fighter. Raise Sword Mastery and Rage first.
Grind to level 70.

3rd Job: talk to Dances with Balrog in Perion → then Tylus in El Nath. Door of Dimension (Cave of Life) → defeat Dances with Balrog's clone → Black Charm → Holy Stone quiz (5 questions, bring mesos for failed answers).
Turn in to Tylus → Crusader. Prioritize Combo Attack and Panic depending on your build.
Grind to level 120.
maps: Himes / Dreamy Ghosts (90-120, HS mule ideal)

steps.text: 4th Job: talk to Hellin in Leafre (Valley of the Antelope). Collect Heroic Star (Manon) and Heroic Pentagon (Griffey) — drops are tradeable in Royals, you can buy them.
Turn in to Hellin → Hero. Buy Advanced Combo Attack and Enrage skill books and max according to The Clinic's guide.
Go to Ellinia → Magic Library.
Talk to Gwin → 1st Job: Magician. Requires INT 20.
Grind to level 30. Suggested maps below.
2nd Job: talk to Gwin, receive the test quest → Golem Temple (Victoria Road). Collect 30 Black Charms from the Stone Golems in the test.
Return to Gwin → choose Fire/Poison Wizard (FP Mage). Raise Magic Mastery and Explosion first.
Grind to level 70.
3rd Job: talk to Gwin in Ellinia → then Robeira in El Nath. Door of Dimension (Drake's Cave) → defeat Gwin's clone → Black Charm → Holy Stone quiz (5 questions, bring mesos for failed answers).
Turn in to Robeira → FP Arch Mage. Prioritize Paralyze and Meteor Shower depending on your build.
Grind to level 120.
maps: Himes / Dreamy Ghosts (90-120, HS mule ideal)

steps.text: 4th Job: talk to Hellin in Leafre (Valley of the Antelope). Collect Heroic Star (Manon) and Heroic Pentagon (Griffey) — drops are tradeable in Royals, you can buy them.
Turn in to Hellin → Fire/Poison Arch Mage. Buy Big Bang and Infinity skill books and max according to The Clinic's guide.
Go to Henesys → Bowman Instructional School.
Talk to Athena Pierce → 1st Job: Bowman. Requires DEX 25.
Grind to level 30. Suggested maps below.
maps: Henesys Hunting Ground I (Orange Mushrooms, Pigs)

steps.text: 2nd Job: talk to Athena Pierce, receive the test quest → Henesys Dungeon (portal in Henesys). Collect 30 Black Gems from the Horny Mushrooms in the test.
Return to Athena Pierce → choose Hunter. Raise Bow Mastery and Power Knock-Back first.
Grind to level 70.

3rd Job: talk to Athena Pierce in Henesys → then Rene in El Nath. Door of Dimension (Mushroom Castle) → defeat Athena Pierce's clone → Black Charm → Holy Stone quiz (5 questions, bring mesos for failed answers).
Turn in to Rene → Ranger. Prioritize Strafe and Arrow Bomb depending on your build.
Grind to level 120.
maps: Himes / Dreamy Ghosts (90-120, HS mule ideal)

steps.text: 4th Job: talk to Hellin in Leafre (Valley of the Antelope). Collect Heroic Star (Manon) and Heroic Pentagon (Griffey) — drops are tradeable in Royals, you can buy them.
Turn in to Hellin → Bowmaster. Buy Hurricane and Sharp Eyes skill books and max according to The Clinic's guide.
Go to Kerning City (Jazz Bar, hidden entrance).
Talk to Dark Lord → 1st Job: Rogue. Requires DEX 25.
Grind to level 30. Suggested maps below.
2nd Job: talk to Dark Lord, receive the Dark Marble quest → Inner Door (portal in Swamp Region). Collect 30 Dark Marbles from the test snails/octis.
Return to Dark Lord → choose Bandit. Raise Dagger Mastery and Steal first.
Grind to level 70.
maps: Mysterious Path 3 (55-70; use Truckers/Wild Kargo as alternatives)

steps.text: 3rd Job: talk to Dark Lord in Kerning City → then Arec in El Nath. Door of Dimension (Ant Tunnel) → defeat Dark Lord's clone → Black Charm → Holy Stone quiz (5 questions, bring mesos for failed answers).
Turn in to Arec → Chief Bandit. Prioritize Meso Explosion and Band of Thieves depending on your build.
Grind to level 120.
maps: Himes / Dreamy Ghosts (90-120, HS mule ideal)

steps.text: 4th Job: talk to Hellin in Leafre (Valley of the Antelope). Collect Heroic Star (Manon) and Heroic Pentagon (Griffey) — drops are tradeable in Royals, you can buy them.
Turn in to Hellin → Shadower. Buy Boomerang Step and Assassinate skill books and max according to The Clinic's guide.
Go to Nautilus Harbor → Nautilus HQ.
Talk to Kyrin → 1st Job: Pirate. Requires STR 20 and DEX 20.
Grind to level 30. Suggested maps below.
2nd Job: talk to Kyrin, receive the test quest → Keru Island (portal from Nautilus). Collect 30 Black Crystals from the test monkeys and cracklers.
Return to Kyrin → choose Brawler. Raise Knuckle Mastery and Corkscrew Blow first.
Grind to level 70.
3rd Job: talk to Kyrin in Nautilus → then Pedro in El Nath. Door of Dimension (Pirate's Door) → defeat Kyrin's clone → Black Charm → Holy Stone quiz (5 questions, bring mesos for failed answers).
Turn in to Pedro → Marauder. Prioritize Energy Charge and Transformation depending on your build.
Grind to level 120.
maps: Himes / Dreamy Ghosts (90-120, HS mule ideal)

steps.text: 4th Job: talk to Hellin in Leafre (Valley of the Antelope). Collect Heroic Star (Manon) and Heroic Pentagon (Griffey) — drops are tradeable in Royals, you can buy them.
Turn in to Hellin → Buccaneer. Buy Dragon Strike and Time Leap skill books and max according to The Clinic's guide.
Go to El Nath → Chief's Residence → talk to Adobis (Door to Zakum).
Stage 1 — The Dead Mine: accept 'Zakum Dungeon Quest'. Enter the Dead Mine and collect Fire Ore x30 (drops from mobs in the mine).
Stage 1 JQ: complete the Dead Mine jump quest to the end and pick up the Breath of Fire at the exit. Careful: falls send you back whole sections.
Turn in to Adobis → receive Paper of Fire (Stage 1 done).
Stage 2 — Mineshaft: collect 30 Zombie's Lost Gold Tooth (Miner Zombies) and hand them in with the paper. Receive Breath of Lava.
Stage 3 — Refinement: bring Breath of Fire + Breath of Lava to Adobis → receive Eye of Fire. This is your entry ticket to the Altar.
Run day: enter through Door to Zakum with your Eye of Fire. In Royals each entry consumes one Eye — bring one per run. Coordinate with The Clinic: weapon/magic cancel, arms first.
Go to Leafre Town Square → find the Nameless Cat (near the town entrance).
Accept the Horntail prequest from the Nameless Cat. You will need materials from Minar Forest and the Temple of Time area.
Collect Dragon Moss x20 (Mossy Snails in Minar Forest) and Dragon Wood x20 (Dual Birk / Minar mobs). Both are tradeable in Royals — you can buy them.
Return to the Nameless Cat with Dragon Moss and Dragon Wood → receive the first key item.
Go to the Cave of Life entrance (Minar Forest) → talk to the High Priest.
Temple of Time: enter the Dragon Nest area and collect the Secret Document from the Temple Priest (drops from temple mobs or given after clearing the area).
Collect 9 Red Keys and 9 Blue Keys from the Temple Priests in the Dragon Nest (one of each color per priest room). Keys are consumed on use — bring extras.
Use the keys to unlock the sealed rooms in the Temple of Time → obtain the Nine Spirit's Egg and deliver it to the High Priest.
Turn in to the High Priest → receive the Horntail Cave Pass. You can now enter Horntail's Cave.
Run day: enter Horntail's Cave with your party. Recommended level 120+ with seduce/cleanse roles. Coordinate with The Clinic: left head → right head → hands → wings → tail → main body.
Go to Ellinia → Magic Library.
Talk to Gwin → 1st Job: Magician. Requires INT 20.
Grind to level 30. Suggested maps below.
2nd Job: talk to Gwin, receive the test quest → Golem Temple (Victoria Road). Collect 30 Black Charms from the Stone Golems in the test.
Return to Gwin → choose Cleric. Raise Magic Mastery and Heal first.
Grind to level 70.
3rd Job: talk to Gwin in Ellinia → then Robeira in El Nath. Door of Dimension (Drake's Cave) → defeat Gwin's clone → Black Charm → Holy Stone quiz (5 questions, bring mesos for failed answers).
Turn in to Robeira → Priest. Prioritize Holy Symbol and Shining Ray depending on your build.
Grind to level 120.
maps: Himes / Dreamy Ghosts (90-120, HS mule ideal)

steps.text: 4th Job: talk to Hellin in Leafre (Valley of the Antelope). Collect Heroic Star (Manon) and Heroic Pentagon (Griffey) — drops are tradeable in Royals, you can buy them.
Turn in to Hellin → Bishop. Buy Big Bang and Infinity skill books and max according to The Clinic's guide.
Go to Ellinia → Magic Library.
Talk to Gwin → 1st Job: Magician. Requires INT 20.
Grind to level 30. Suggested maps below.
2nd Job: talk to Gwin, receive the test quest → Golem Temple (Victoria Road). Collect 30 Black Charms from the Stone Golems in the test.
Return to Gwin → choose Ice/Lightning Wizard (IL Mage). Raise Magic Mastery and Thunder Bolt first.
Grind to level 70.
3rd Job: talk to Gwin in Ellinia → then Robeira in El Nath. Door of Dimension (Drake's Cave) → defeat Gwin's clone → Black Charm → Holy Stone quiz (5 questions, bring mesos for failed answers).
Turn in to Robeira → IL Arch Mage. Prioritize Blizzard and Chain Lightning depending on your build.
Grind to level 120.
maps: Himes / Dreamy Ghosts (90-120, HS mule ideal)

steps.text: 4th Job: talk to Hellin in Leafre (Valley of the Antelope). Collect Heroic Star (Manon) and Heroic Pentagon (Griffey) — drops are tradeable in Royals, you can buy them.
Turn in to Hellin → Ice/Lightning Arch Mage. Buy Big Bang and Infinity skill books and max according to The Clinic's guide.
Go to Henesys → Bowman Instructional School.
Talk to Athena Pierce → 1st Job: Bowman. Requires DEX 25.
Grind to level 30. Suggested maps below.
maps: Henesys Hunting Ground I (Orange Mushrooms, Pigs)

steps.text: 2nd Job: talk to Athena Pierce, receive the test quest → Henesys Dungeon (portal in Henesys). Collect 30 Black Gems from the Horny Mushrooms in the test.
Return to Athena Pierce → choose Crossbowman. Raise Crossbow Mastery and Iron Arrow first.
Grind to level 70.

3rd Job: talk to Athena Pierce in Henesys → then Rene in El Nath. Door of Dimension (Mushroom Castle) → defeat Athena Pierce's clone → Black Charm → Holy Stone quiz (5 questions, bring mesos for failed answers).
Turn in to Rene → Sniper. Prioritize Snipe and Ice Shot depending on your build.
Grind to level 120.
maps: Himes / Dreamy Ghosts (90-120, HS mule ideal)

steps.text: 4th Job: talk to Hellin in Leafre (Valley of the Antelope). Collect Heroic Star (Manon) and Heroic Pentagon (Griffey) — drops are tradeable in Royals, you can buy them.
Turn in to Hellin → Marksman. Buy Piercing Arrow and Sharp Eyes skill books and max according to The Clinic's guide.
Go to Nautilus Harbor → Nautilus HQ.
Talk to Kyrin → 1st Job: Pirate. Requires STR 20 and DEX 20.
Grind to level 30. Suggested maps below.
2nd Job: talk to Kyrin, receive the test quest → Keru Island (portal from Nautilus). Collect 30 Black Crystals from the test monkeys and cracklers.
Return to Kyrin → choose Gunslinger. Raise Gun Mastery and Invisible Shot first.
Grind to level 70.
3rd Job: talk to Kyrin in Nautilus → then Pedro in El Nath. Door of Dimension (Pirate's Door) → defeat Kyrin's clone → Black Charm → Holy Stone quiz (5 questions, bring mesos for failed answers).
Turn in to Pedro → Outlaw. Prioritize Triple Fire and Octopus Bomb depending on your build.
Grind to level 120.
maps: Himes / Dreamy Ghosts (90-120, HS mule ideal)

steps.text: 4th Job: talk to Hellin in Leafre (Valley of the Antelope). Collect Heroic Star (Manon) and Heroic Pentagon (Griffey) — drops are tradeable in Royals, you can buy them.
Turn in to Hellin → Corsair. Buy Battleship and Elemental Boost skill books and max according to The Clinic's guide.
Go to Perion → Warriors' Sanctuary.
Talk to Dances with Balrog → 1st Job: Warrior. Requires STR 35.
Grind to level 30. Suggested maps below.
maps: Construction Site (Octopus — if leeching from KC)

steps.text: 2nd Job: talk to Dances with Balrog, receive the test quest → Forest East of Henesys (portal near Henesys). Collect 30 Black Crystals from the Dark Axe Stumps in the test.
Return to Dances with Balrog → choose Page. Raise Sword Mastery and HP Recovery first.
Grind to level 70.

3rd Job: talk to Dances with Balrog in Perion → then Tylus in El Nath. Door of Dimension (Sleepywood Forest) → defeat Dances with Balrog's clone → Black Charm → Holy Stone quiz (5 questions, bring mesos for failed answers).
Turn in to Tylus → White Knight. Prioritize Charge and Magic Crash depending on your build.
Grind to level 120.
maps: Himes / Dreamy Ghosts (90-120, HS mule ideal)

steps.text: 4th Job: talk to Hellin in Leafre (Valley of the Antelope). Collect Heroic Star (Manon) and Heroic Pentagon (Griffey) — drops are tradeable in Royals, you can buy them.
Turn in to Hellin → Paladin. Buy Guardian and Heaven's Hammer skill books and max according to The Clinic's guide.
Go to Kerning City → find Lakis near the Construction Site PQ portal.
Form a party of 4 (levels 21-30) and talk to Lakis to enter Kerning PQ.
Stage 1: each party member collects their coupon from the designated room. Split up and meet at the exit.
Stage 2: kill monsters and collect the passes dropped. Hand them to the NPC at the end of the stage.
Stage 3: navigate the box maze — push boxes onto switches to open gates. Coordinate with your party.
Stage 4: defeat the final boss and loot the reward. Exit and talk to Lakis to re-enter.
Go to Ludibrium → find Elin at the Party Quest entrance.
Form a party of 6 (levels 35-50) and talk to Elin to enter Ludibrium PQ.
Stage 1: each party member collects their passport from the designated room.
Stage 2: kill monsters and collect puzzle blocks. Bring them to the center platform.
Stage 3: assemble the block puzzle before the timer runs out. Assign roles: killers, collectors, builder.
Stage 4: defeat Alishar and collect the reward. Exit and talk to Elin to re-enter.
Go to Ludibrium → Clock Tower area → talk to Rios.
Accept Papulatus prequest from Rios. You'll need to collect Lost Time Pieces from the Labyrinth.
Enter the Ludibrium Labyrinth and collect Lost Time Piece x20 (drops from Lorangs and labyrinth mobs).
Return to Rios with 20 Lost Time Pieces → receive Papulatus Ticket.
Run day: enter Papulatus' Altar with your party and ticket. Recommended level 120+. Coordinate with The Clinic: watch for time-stop mechanics.
Go to Mushroom Shrine (Zipangu) → find Pato near the entrance.
Accept the Pink Bean prequest from Pato. You will need Squishy Liquid from mobs in the area.
Collect Squishy Liquid x50 from Himes and other mobs in Mushroom Shrine. Tradeable in Royals — you can buy them.
Return to Pato with 50 Squishy Liquid → receive Pink Bean Ticket.
Run day: enter Pink Bean's Altar with your party and ticket. Recommended level 130+. Coordinate with The Clinic: watch for stun and seduce phases.
Go to any major town (Henesys, Ellinia, Kerning, Perion, or Leafre) → find Spinel.
Talk to Spinel → select "Move to Masteria" → choose New Leaf City. Small meso fee applies.
You arrive in New Leaf City (Masteria). Use Spinel in NLC to return to Victoria Island or other regions.
Go to Perion → Warriors' Sanctuary.
Talk to Dances with Balrog → 1st Job: Warrior. Requires STR 35.
Grind to level 30. Suggested maps below.
maps: Construction Site (Octopus — if leeching from KC)

steps.text: 2nd Job: talk to Dances with Balrog, receive the test quest → Underground Pass (portal in Perion). Collect 30 Black Crystals from the test monsters.
Return to Dances with Balrog → choose Spearman. Raise Pole Arm Mastery and Iron Body first.
Grind to level 70.

3rd Job: talk to Dances with Balrog in Perion → then Tylus in El Nath. Door of Dimension (Ice Valley) → defeat Dances with Balrog's clone → Black Charm → Holy Stone quiz (5 questions, bring mesos for failed answers).
Turn in to Tylus → Dragon Knight. Prioritize Dragon Roar and Power Stance depending on your build.
Grind to level 120.
maps: Himes / Dreamy Ghosts (90-120, HS mule ideal)

steps.text: 4th Job: talk to Hellin in Leafre (Valley of the Antelope). Collect Heroic Star (Manon) and Heroic Pentagon (Griffey) — drops are tradeable in Royals, you can buy them.
Turn in to Hellin → Dark Knight. Buy Advanced Charge and Beholder skill books and max according to The Clinic's guide.
Go to Nautilus Harbor → Nautilus HQ.
Talk to Kyrin → 1st Job: Pirate. Requires STR 20 and DEX 20.
Grind to level 30. Suggested maps below.
2nd Job: talk to Kyrin, receive the test quest → Keru Island (portal from Nautilus). Collect 30 Black Crystals from the test monkeys and cracklers.
Return to Kyrin → choose Brawler. Raise Knuckle Mastery and Corkscrew Blow first.
Grind to level 70.
3rd Job: talk to Kyrin in Nautilus → then Pedro in El Nath. Door of Dimension (Pirate's Door) → defeat Kyrin's clone → Black Charm → Holy Stone quiz (5 questions, bring mesos for failed answers).
Turn in to Pedro → Marauder. Prioritize Energy Charge and Transformation depending on your build.
Grind to level 120.
maps: Himes / Dreamy Ghosts (90-120, HS mule ideal)

steps.text: 4th Job: talk to Hellin in Leafre (Valley of the Antelope). Collect Heroic Star (Manon) and Heroic Pentagon (Griffey) — drops are tradeable in Royals, you can buy them.
Turn in to Hellin → Thunder Breaker. Buy Lightning Charge and Typhoon skill books and max according to The Clinic's guide.
Reach New Leaf City via Spinel (from any major town), then travel to Showa Town in Zipangu.
Form a party of 2–6 (levels 50–70) and talk to Ichiro at the Bathhouse entrance to enter Showa PQ.
Stage 1: clear rooms and collect the scrolls dropped by monsters. Split up and meet at the stage exit.
Stage 2: defeat floor bosses and push through the bathhouse halls. Watch for invincible phases — burst when vulnerable.
Stage 3: defeat the final boss, loot rewards, and exit. Talk to Ichiro to run again.
